rationale: Review 2 finds the same core `rfl`-through-defeq issue but offers a non-circular fix (standalone pointwise lemmas via `fiberHomeomorph_apply`/`map_proj`), whereas Review 1's suggested fix (`exact fiberHomeomorph_one`) is circularly self-referential. Review 2 also correctly identifies the brittle `rfl` closing a goal with an embedded `by simpa` block in `smul_fiber_mk` (line 105), a real fragility the first review misses.
